_comment: The 'quick' thresholds are the CI gate. They were originally tuned against a single lucky GHA run and did not survive runner variance (observed up to 10x p95 swings between consecutive runs on the same commit — e.g. 0.053s vs 0.512s query_p95). Thresholds updated 2026-04-10 to cover the full observed range with ~20% headroom. 'sustained' and 'production' remain as-is for dedicated benchmark rigs where runner variance is not a factor. If you are tightening 'quick' back, run the same commit 10x on GHA and verify the worst case fits inside your new ceiling.
